session_focus: Clarify whether the top-left dashboard counter should show orchestration cycles or completed DAG tasks.
user_directives: Clarify whether the top-left dashboard counter should show orchestration cycles or completed DAG tasks.
assistant_responses: Separated the meaning: loop cycles reflect runtime passes, task DAG reflects completed GUI work. Variant 25 preserves the conversation milestone as reusable training data rather than transient chat.
training_value: Operational counters must be semantically named or they become misleading.

The loop counter advanced independently of completed tasks, which confused visible progress interpretation. Variant 25 reframes the same milestone through the lens of runtime verification, UI trust, and repo-backed data visibility.
